message:
chore: update Cargo.lock and minor adjustments to conformance, persist, and runtime

Regenerate Cargo.lock for new fr-bench workspace member. Minor
adjustments in fr-conformance, fr-persist, and fr-runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
